task: Retrieve OpenClaw API Key for task board access
context: I am currently unable to create tasks on the task board (http://localhost:3011/api/tasks) due to 'Missing API key' error. I tried reading .env but it's not found. I found several .env files in ~/.openclaw/secrets/: master_key.hash, moltbook-xiaoka.env, n8n-production.env, n8n-telegram.env. I suspect OPENCLAW_API_KEY might be in one of these. How can I safely retrieve and use the correct OPENCLAW_API_KEY to authenticate my curl requests for task creation? I need the key string itself, or instructions on which file to read and how to extract it.
